description: Abnormal sentiment score for novel, relevant, and non-neutral news for the past one day relative to past year baseline
Abnormal news volume (number of news items or mentions) over a 1-day window; quantifies whether the day's news coverage is unusually high relative to normal baselines
Accounts payable turnover ratio, typically cost of goods sold divided by average accounts payable
Accounts receivable turnover ratio, indicating how many times accounts receivable are collected during a period (higher ratio means quicker collection)
Percent accruals, representing the percentage of accruals (i.e., non-cash components of earnings) relative to a base such as revenue or assets, used as a quality or earnings manipulation indicator
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for next-fiscal-year Book Value Per Share (BPS), diffusion measured over the past 1 month
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year's book value per share (BPS) over the trailing 3 months (diffusion ratio)
Change in consensus forecast for next fiscal year's (FY1) Book Value Per Share (BPS) over the past 3 months
Three-month rolling revision in analyst estimates of Book Value Per Share (BPS) for the next twelve months (NTM)
1-month rolling sum or average of analyst revisions to next-twelve-months (NTM) Book Value Per Share estimates
Change in analyst consensus estimate for next fiscal year (FY1) Cash Flow Per Share aggregated over the trailing 1 month
Diffusion ratio of analyst upward to downward revisions for next fiscal year's Dividend Per Share (DPS) estimates, measured over the past 3 months
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions on forecasted dividend per share (DPS) for FY1, measured via diffusion (proportion) over the past 1 month
One-month rolling change in analyst estimates of Dividends Per Share (DPS) for the next twelve months (NTM)
Net change in consensus analyst forecasts for next fiscal year dividends per share (DPS) aggregated over the most recent 1 month
Change in next fiscal year (FY1) analyst EBIT estimates, aggregated over the last 1 month
Three-month aggregated analyst estimate revision for Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Net aggregate analyst estimate revisions for Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) for the next twelve months (NTM) over the past 1 month
Diffusion ratio (upward vs downward) of analyst revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) EBITDA forecast, calculated over the past 3 months
Rolling 1-month aggregated analyst estimate revision for EBITDA forecasts for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Rolling 1-month net change in consensus analyst estimates for EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest, Tax, Depreciation, and Amortization) for the next 12 months (NTM)
Aggregate analyst revision to the consensus estimate of next-twelve-months (NTM) EBITDA over the trailing 3 months
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) earnings per share (EPS) over the past 1 month
Change in analyst consensus estimate for Earnings Per Share for the next fiscal year (FY1), aggregated over the trailing 1 month; 1M rolling FY1 EPS revision
Aggregate revision (typically mean change) in analyst estimated EPS for the next twelve months (NTM), computed over the trailing 3 months
Difference between long-term (5-year) expected growth and shorter-term (FY2) expected growth, measuring the expectation gap in analyst forecasts
Three-month rolling sum or average of analyst forecast revisions for long-term growth rate
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year's net asset value over the past 1 month (diffusion ratio)
Diffusion ratio (upward vs downward) of next fiscal year (FY1) analyst NAV (Net Asset Value) estimate revisions over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month net analyst estimate revision in next fiscal year (FY1) net asset value (NAV); tracks the aggregate change in consensus NAV expectations over 3 months
Rolling 1-month net change in analyst estimate(s) for Net Asset Value (NAV) over the next twelve months
Change in consensus analyst estimates of next twelve months' Net Asset Value (NAV), aggregated over the most recent 3 months
Three-month rolling revision in analyst estimates of Normalized Earnings Per Share (NEPS) for the next twelve months (NTM)
Number of analysts providing recommendations for the security
1-month diffusion ratio of analyst recommendation changes (upgrades versus downgrades)
Analyst recommendation diffusion ratio (upgrades/downgrades) over the last 3 months, indicating the directional momentum of analyst recommendations
Net change in analyst recommendation (e.g., upgrades minus downgrades) over the past 1 month
1-month diffusion ratio of upward/downward analyst revenue estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1); measures the proportion of positive versus negative estimate changes
Net change in analyst consensus revenue forecast for next fiscal year (FY1) over the past 1 month (revision momentum)
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions to Revenue (Sales) forecasts for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Aggregate change in analyst estimates for next-twelve-month revenue (sales) over the past 1 month; i.e., rolling 1-month sum/mean of NTM sales estimate revisions
Change in analyst consensus forecast for next twelve months' (NTM) sales/revenue, aggregated over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions to Return on Equity forecasts for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revision for next-twelve-months forecasted return on equity (ROE)
Diffusion ratio (upward to downward changes) of analyst target price revisions over the trailing 1 month; measures directional momentum in target price revisions
Ratio of upward to downward analyst target price revisions (diffusion ratio) over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst target price revisions
Year-over-year change in asset turnover ratio, capturing the increase or decrease in sales-to-assets efficiency compared to the previous year
Asset turnover ratio for the next fiscal year (FY1), calculated as expected sales divided by total assets, using FY1 forecasted values
Sales to total assets ratio, also known as asset turnover
Mean volatility forecast
Earnings yield for the trailing twelve months, calculated using basic EPS; the inverse of the P/E ratio (LTM, basic)
Rolling 1-month revision in analyst consensus estimate for next fiscal year (FY1) Book Value Per Share
Cash Flow Return on Equity (CFROE), forecasted for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Diffusion ratio of analyst revisions (ratio of upward to downward changes) for next fiscal year (FY1) Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) estimates over past 1 month
Diffusion ratio (upward vs. downward) of analyst FY1 (next fiscal year) Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) estimate revisions over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) cash flow per share
Chaikin Money Flow indicator, a technical measure combining price and volume to assess accumulation or distribution by tracking money flow over a set period
Chaikin Oscillator, a momentum indicator of the Accumulation/Distribution Line of a security

Close Location Value, a technical indicator measuring where the closing price falls within the high-low range for the day, usually calculated as (Close - Low) / (High - Low), giving insight into intraday buying or selling pressure
Consensus analyst estimate of expected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for Earnings Per Share over the next 5 years
Growth rate of current liabilities per share over a specified period
Growth in current liabilities, showing the rate at which current liabilities have increased or decreased over time
Current ratio, a liquidity measure calculated as current assets divided by current liabilities
Ratio of total debt to total equity, measuring financial leverage of the company
Ratio of total debt to total debt plus equity at current market value (market capitalization)
Ratio of total debt to total capital
Detrended Price Oscillator—a technical indicator that removes trend from price data to highlight short-term cycles or overbought/oversold conditions
Earnings yield (inverse of P/E) over the last twelve months (LTM), using diluted EPS figures
Merton distance-to-default score estimating credit/default risk based on the Merton structural model
Dividend payout ratio over trailing period; proportion of earnings distributed as dividends
Dividend per share (DPS) surprise, representing the difference between actual DPS reported and consensus analyst expectations
Forecasted dividend yield for the next fiscal year (FY1), calculated as expected dividends divided by current price
Rolling 3-month aggregated change in analyst estimates for Dividend Per Share (DPS) for the upcoming fiscal year (FY1)
Median analyst forecasted earnings yield for the next fiscal year (FY1); earnings divided by price based on FY1 forecast
Product of earnings yield (inverse of P/E, LTM basic EPS) and expected 5-year earnings growth, capturing value and growth combined
Earnings yield (LTM, basic) multiplied by the sum of expected 5-year EPS growth and expected dividend yield; integrates value, growth, and income
Earnings yield (inverse of P/E) based on the median consensus analyst forecast for the next twelve months (NTM)
Ease of Movement indicator, which quantifies the relationship between price change and volume, typically highlighting how easily price can move in the market with low volume
Diffusion ratio (upward vs downward) of analyst revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) EBIT forecast, over the past 1 month
Diffusion ratio (upward vs downward) of analyst estimate revisions to Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past three months
EBIT surprise, the normalized difference between reported and consensus-expected EBIT
EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes) divided by Enterprise Value (EV)
Diffusion ratio (upward to downward changes) of analyst consensus estimate revisions for EBITDA in the next fiscal year (FY1), over the past 1 month
Change in analyst consensus estimate for next fiscal year's (FY1) EBITDA, aggregated over the most recent 3-month rolling window
Standardized difference (surprise) between reported EBITDA and the analyst consensus estimate
Ratio of EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation & Amortization) to Enterprise Value (EV), a commonly used valuation multiple
Total number of employees at the company
Number of analysts providing EPS estimates for the next fiscal year
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) EPS over the past 3 months
Dispersion (typically standard deviation) of analyst forecasts for next fiscal year (FY1) earnings per share, indicating uncertainty or disagreement among analysts
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revision metric for EPS in next fiscal year (FY1)
Earnings per share surprise metric with recent periods weighted more heavily (decayed effect)
Coefficient of variation for FY1 EPS estimates, measuring dispersion or variability of analyst projections normalized by mean estimate (standard deviation/mean)
Expected dividend payout ratio (dividends as a percentage of earnings) based on forward-looking estimates
Expected (forward-looking) dividend yield, i.e., anticipated annual dividends as a percentage of current price
Growth rate of dividends per share (DPS) expected in the company's next fiscal year after the current one (Fiscal Year 2)
Expected or forecasted growth rate of earnings per share (EPS) for the second fiscal year ahead (FY2)
Stability (usually temporal consistency, e.g., R-squared or similar) of the expected 5-year earnings per share (EPS) growth estimate
Year-over-year expected growth in interim Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) according to analyst consensus or company guidance
Year-over-year expected growth in interim Earnings Per Share (EPS), likely based on analyst consensus forecasts
Year-over-year growth in expected interim (not annual, but perhaps half-year or quarterly) revenue/sales based on analyst forecasts
Projected revenue growth for the second fiscal year in the future (FY2), typically based on analyst estimates
Net amount of external financing scaled by net operating assets, indicating reliance on external funding relative to internally generated assets
Compound annual growth rate (trend) of cash flow per share (CFPS) over the past 5 years
Compound annual growth rate or trend of dividends per share (DPS) over the last 5 years, representing historical dividend growth
Historical 5-year earnings per share (EPS) growth trend, measuring compound annual growth rate or average growth of EPS over the past five years
Growth trend in operating earnings per share over the past five years
Compound annual growth rate or trend of a company’s revenues over the past 5 years, indicating historical sales growth
Stability score of return on assets (ROA) over the past 5 years, probably measured as R-squared or variance
Stability (temporal consistency, e.g., R-squared or similar) of Return on Equity over the past 5 years, indicating how stable profitability is
Float turnover ratio over the last 12 months, calculated as total trading volume divided by free-floating shares outstanding
Force Index, a technical indicator that combines price change and volume to measure the strength of price moves
Earnings yield using the median analyst forecast of FY2 (second fiscal year forward) basic EPS, as a forward-looking value measure
Price-to-earnings ratio based on median consensus analyst EPS estimate for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Price-to-sales ratio using the forecasted sales for the upcoming fiscal year (FY1)
Ratio of levered free cash flow to total enterprise value (TEV); a valuation metric indicating free cash flow yield to all providers of capital
Free cash flow yield (unlevered), calculated as free cash flow divided by market capitalization or enterprise value
Year-over-year change in gross profit margin; how much the margin has increased or decreased compared to the same period last year
Gross profit margin, i.e., gross profit divided by total revenue
High Low Mid Point: the average of the highest and lowest price over a specific period, used to track price central tendency
Historical stability of earnings per share measured as coefficient of determination (R²) over time
Reinvestment rate over the last twelve months, likely calculated as retained earnings or (capex + change in working capital) divided by net income or total capital
Historical relative earnings yield

Historical stability of a company's revenue, measured as the coefficient of determination (R-squared) over a historical period, indicating how consistent or predictable the revenue stream has been over time
Interest coverage ratio, typically EBIT or EBITDA divided by interest expense
Year-over-year growth rate in interim (semi-annual or quarterly) cash flow per share (CFPS), based on historical data
Year-over-year historical growth rate of interim dividend per share (DPS)
Year-over-year growth rate of interim (i.e., not full-year) earnings per share (EPS), capturing the percentage change in interim EPS compared to the same interim period last year
Year-over-year growth rate of interim revenue based on historical data
Historical year-over-year growth in interim (periodic but not full-year) revenue per share, measuring trend in sales on a per-share basis between reported interim periods
Inventory turnover ratio; measures how many times a company's inventory is sold and replaced over a period, usually calculated as Cost of Goods Sold divided by Average Inventory
Natural logarithm of float-adjusted market capitalization; represents the size of a stock after adjusting for shares available to the public
Natural logarithm of the company’s total revenue
Natural logarithm of total market capitalization (market value of all outstanding shares)
Natural logarithm of the current share price
Year-over-year change in the ratio of long-term debt to common equity, measuring balance sheet leverage trend annually
Ratio of long-term debt to common equity, indicating the portion of capitalization provided by long-term borrowed funds compared to shareholders' equity
Long-term debt as a percentage of total capital (debt plus equity); a leverage metric showing financial structure risk
One-month diffusion ratio of analyst long-term growth estimate revisions; proportion of upward to downward changes in analyst LTG estimates over past month
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for long-term growth expectations over the past 3 months
1-month aggregated rolling analyst revisions to long-term EPS or growth forecasts (LTG = Long-Term Growth)
Market capitalization of the company, computed as the total market value of all outstanding shares (price × shares outstanding) as of the record date
Mass Index, a technical indicator designed to identify trend reversals by measuring range (volatility) expansion in price
Highest single-day return observed for the stock during the past month, used as a proxy for lottery-like return behavior
Earnings yield (inverse of P/E) based on analyst consensus forecast EPS for the next fiscal year (FY1), using the median estimate
Price-to-Earnings ratio calculated as current stock price divided by analyst consensus forecast EPS for the next fiscal year (FY1), using the median estimate
Earnings yield (inverse of P/E) based on analyst consensus forecast EPS for the second next fiscal year (FY2), using the median estimate
Price-to-Earnings ratio calculated as current stock price divided by analyst consensus forecast EPS for the second next fiscal year (FY2), using the median estimate
Signal for moving average crossover: difference or indicator of when 30-week moving average crosses 75-week moving average of price; identifies longer-term trend shifts
Signal for moving average crossover: difference between 15-week and 36-week moving averages of price; often used to detect medium-term trend reversals
Abnormal trading volume indicator, most likely measuring how the most recent trading volume deviates from typical levels (such as relative to a moving average), highlighting spikes in activity
Acceleration in revenue (sales) growth rate measured over the previous five years, quantifying the change in the growth trajectory of company revenues
Sloan (1996) accruals metric: measures the portion of earnings due to accrual accounting versus cash flow, often used as a quality or earnings manipulation risk indicator
Altman's z-score for bankruptcy prediction as defined in the original 1968 model (composite score using several financial ratios)
Altman's Z-score using the 1983 revised formula, an updated bankruptcy risk and financial distress indicator
Amihud illiquidity ratio, measuring price impact per unit of trading volume
Return on assets based on trailing twelve months
Asset growth anomaly factor as defined by Cooper, Gulen, and Schill (2008); generally the year-over-year growth rate of total assets, used as a predictive factor for stock returns
Year-over-year growth rate in total assets on a per share basis (total assets divided by shares outstanding)
Earnings yield based on last twelve months (LTM) reported earnings per share, using the basic (not diluted) calculation; measured as EPS divided by price
Price-to-earnings ratio, based on trailing twelve months (LTM) basic EPS (not diluted), calculated as current price divided by basic EPS over the last year
Bollinger Bands, a technical analysis indicator constructed from a moving average and standard deviation bands to measure price volatility and possible trading ranges
Berry ratio, defined as gross profits divided by operating expenses
Book-to-market ratio, calculated as book value divided by market price; a value factor commonly used for valuation comparisons
Book-to-market ratio (the inverse of price-to-book) using forecasted book value for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Ratio of cash flow from operations to current liabilities (measures a firm's ability to cover its short-term obligations with operational cash generation)
Operating cash flow yield, calculated as operating cash flow divided by market capitalization (price), indicating the cash generation efficiency relative to stock price
Operating cash flow yield (i.e. operating cash flow divided by market capitalization or enterprise value) projected or estimated for the next fiscal year (FY1)

Normalized cash flow per share (CFPS) surprise: standardized difference between actual reported CFPS and consensus analyst estimate, showing the degree to which actual results deviate from expectations
Cash flow return on net operating assets: cash flow from operations divided by net operating assets
Cash flow return on assets, measuring operating cash flow generated as a percentage of total assets
Cash flow return on equity, measuring operating cash flow generated as a percentage of shareholders’ equity
Forecasted Cash Flow Return on Equity for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Current ratio, a liquidity metric defined as current assets divided by current liabilities
Total return of the stock over the past 2520 days (approximately 120 months, or 10 years)
Total return over the past 1260 trading days (approximately 60 months or 5 years), including price appreciation and any dividends
Total return of the security over the past 21 trading days (approximately 1 month)
Stock price momentum as total return over the past 252 trading days, commonly representing one full year (12 months) of trading days
Cumulative total return over the past 63 trading days (approximately 3 months), including price appreciation and dividends if applicable
Stock return (momentum) over past 126 trading days, roughly 6 months
Stock price momentum as total return over the past 189 trading days, approximately equivalent to the last nine months
Diluted earnings yield for the last twelve months—LTM net income per diluted share divided by price, the inverse of the diluted P/E ratio
Price-to-Earnings ratio calculated on trailing twelve months (LTM) earnings per share, using diluted earnings to account for potential share dilution
Ratio of total debt to total capital (i.e., total debt divided by the sum of total debt and equity, gauges overall leverage)
Year-over-year change in total debt outstanding for the company
Ratio of total debt to total equity, measuring financial leverage
Ratio of total debt to the market value of total capital (i.e., total debt divided by market capitalization plus debt, reflecting market-based leverage)
Dividend payout ratio, trailing; proportion of earnings paid out as dividends over the trailing period
Total yield combining dividend yield and yield from share buybacks or share count reduction; represents shareholder return from both dividends and buyback activity
Expected future dividend yield based on analyst or company forecasts
Forecasted dividend yield for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Shareholder total yield: combines dividend yield with net share buybacks minus share issuances, representing the total cash return to shareholders as a percent of price
Trailing dividend yield, calculated as sum of dividends over past year divided by current price
Growth flow yield
Free cash flow yield, calculated as unlevered free cash flow divided by market capitalization (or enterprise value)
Historical relative earnings yield, i.e., company earnings yield relative to some benchmark or cross-sectional group
Surprise metric for Dividends Per Share (DPS), typically measured as the deviation of reported DPS from consensus analyst estimates, possibly standardized as a z-score
Ratio of earnings before interest and tax (EBIT) to enterprise value (EV)
Actual reported EBIT minus consensus forecasted EBIT, typically normalized (EBIT surprise, measures recent performance versus expectations)
Ratio of earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization to enterprise value (EBITDA/EV), a valuation metric
EBITDA surprise: normalized difference between reported EBITDA and the consensus estimate (e.g. z-score or percent deviation), quantifying how much the reported figure beat or missed expectations
The cross-sectional or analyst dispersion (standard deviation or spread) of FY1 (next fiscal year) EPS estimates, measuring analyst disagreement about earnings
Historical stability of earnings per share (EPS), usually measured as the coefficient of determination (R-squared) of time-series EPS, reflecting consistency and forecasting reliability
Earnings Per Share (EPS) surprise, as measured (e.g., deviation from analyst consensus), incorporating time-decay so that more recent surprises are weighted more heavily
Coefficient of variation (standard deviation divided by mean) of FY1 (next fiscal year) analyst EPS (Earnings Per Share) estimates, measuring the dispersion in EPS forecasts
Product of current trailing 12-month earnings yield and the sum of expected 5-year EPS growth and expected dividend yield; composite value/growth metric
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for FY1 EBIT estimates over the past 1 month (diffusion ratio)
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for FY1 EBIT estimates over the past 3 months (diffusion ratio)
1-month rolling aggregated analyst revisions to next fiscal year's EBIT estimates
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes)
Aggregate 1-month rolling net change in consensus analyst estimates for next twelve months (NTM) EBIT for the stock
Aggregate 3-month rolling net change in consensus analyst estimates for next twelve months (NTM) EBIT for the stock
Analyst FY1 EBITDA estimate diffusion (upward vs downward revisions ratio) over 1 month
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) EBITDA estimates over the past three months (3M); quantifies directional momentum in expected EBITDA
Net analyst consensus revision in forecasted EBITDA for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past 1 month, capturing how analyst estimates for next year EBITDA have changed in the last month

Aggregate 3-month analyst revision metric for EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization) for the next fiscal year (FY1). Indicates the total upward or downward changes in consensus EBITDA estimates over the past 3 months
Aggregate 1-month revision in analyst estimates for next twelve months EBITDA
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst estimate revision for next twelve months’ (NTM) EBITDA, measuring changes in consensus forward EBITDA forecasts over the past three months
Difference between the analyst consensus expected 5-year compound annual growth rate and FY2 (second year forward) earnings growth; measures the medium-long term optimism gap in analyst forecasts
Net analyst revision in normalized next-twelve-month EPS estimate over the past 3 months
Ratio of upward to downward FY1 analyst revisions for return on equity over the past 1 month (diffusion measure)
Ratio of upward to downward FY1 analyst revisions for return on equity over the past 3 months (diffusion measure)
Consensus analyst estimate of return on equity (ROE) for the next fiscal year (FY1), likely measured as mean or median estimate
Change or net revision in analyst estimates for Return on Equity (ROE) for the next fiscal year (FY1), aggregated over the most recent 1 month
Change in fiscal year 1 (FY1, next fiscal year) consensus analyst estimate for ROE, aggregated over the past 3 months
Change in next twelve months (NTM) consensus analyst estimate for ROE, aggregated over the past 1 month
Change in next twelve months (NTM) consensus analyst estimate for ROE, aggregated over the past 3 months
Ratio of the number of upward to downward analyst revisions for next fiscal year revenue estimates over the past month (1M); indicates directional momentum in analyst revenue forecasts for FY1
Diffusion (up/down ratio) of analyst estimate revisions for revenue (sales) for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past 3 months; quantifies the ratio of upward versus downward estimate changes
Aggregate 1-month analyst revision metric for revenue (sales) for the next fiscal year (FY1), summarizing consensus estimate changes over the past month
Aggregate 3-month rolling sum or average of analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) revenue (sales); measures momentum in sales forecasts
Cumulative analyst revisions to next twelve months (NTM) revenue forecasts over the past 1 month
Net analyst consensus revision in projected sales/revenue for the next twelve months (NTM) aggregated over the last 3 months
Mean forecasted volatility by analysts for the security, expressing aggregate analyst view on expected future price variability
Aggregate 1-month change in analyst estimates of forecasted earnings volatility
Aggregate 3-month change in analyst estimates of forecasted earnings volatility
Expected dividend payout ratio, which is the expected proportion of earnings paid out as dividends
Amount of net external financing (e.g., through debt or equity issuance) as a ratio or relative to net operating assets, indicating external capital dependence
Float turnover over 12 months: measures the trading turnover of free-float shares over a 12-month period, indicating liquidity and investor activity
Chaikin Money Flow, a technical indicator combining price and volume to measure buying and selling pressure over a given period (usually 20–21 days)
Year-over-year (YoY) change in Return on Assets (ROA), representing the difference or percent change from prior year to current
Year-over-year change in ratio of long-term debt to common equity, indicating how leverage has changed relative to equity over the last year
Historical 5-year compound annual growth rate or trend of company sales/revenue
Year-over-year expected growth rate of interim (i.e., period-to-date, possibly semiannual or quarterly) revenues, likely based on analyst estimates or company guidance
Stability (likely R² or similar) of consensus-expected 5-year EPS growth—measuring the consistency of these growth expectations over time
Expected revenue growth for next fiscal year (FY1) based on analyst or company forecasts
Projected growth rate in revenue for the fiscal year two years ahead
Year-over-year growth rate of interim total revenue based on historical actuals
Reinvestment rate measured over the last twelve months (LTM), representing the proportion of earnings or cash flows reinvested back into the business rather than paid out as dividends or expenses
Forecasted reinvestment rate (the proportion of earnings expected to be reinvested in the business) for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Gross profit margin, calculated as gross profit divided by sales, measuring the percentage of revenue remaining after cost of goods sold
Year-over-year (YoY) change in gross profit margin, showing the difference in gross margin percentage compared to the same period last year
GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) 8-digit sub-industry code
Mean analyst recommendation for the stock, typically coded numerically (e.g., 1=Buy, 5=Sell); gives the overall consensus rating among covering analysts
Commodity Channel Index: measures deviation of price from its statistical mean, used to identify cyclical trends in securities
Money Flow Index, a volume-weighted momentum indicator
Ratio of current price to 52-week high, measuring how close the stock is to its highest price in the last year
Mass Index, a technical indicator used to identify potential price trend reversals based on range expansion
Interest coverage component as defined in Altman's Z-score credit risk model (1968)
Inventory turnover ratio, measuring how many times inventory is sold or replaced over a specific period
Force Index: a technical analysis indicator combining price changes and trading volume to measure buying and selling pressure
True Strength Index: a momentum oscillator that measures double-smoothed price changes to identify trend direction and strength, helping to filter out short-term price fluctuations
Vortex Indicator, a technical analysis indicator to identify trend direction and strength
Negative Volume Index, a technical indicator that tracks price changes on days when trading volume decreases, used to identify trends driven by “smart money”
Kurtosis of daily stock returns calculated over the past 1 year, indicating "tailedness" or extremity of return distribution
Accumulation/Distribution Line; a technical indicator measuring the cumulative money flow into or out of a stock, blending price and volume to indicate buying/selling pressure
Natural logarithm of the company's total assets, likely for scaling/normalization purposes
Natural logarithm of float-adjusted market capitalization (market cap adjusted for freely tradeable shares)
Natural logarithm of the total market capitalization of the company
Natural logarithm of the share price
Natural logarithm of revenue, a transformed scale of the company’s total sales or revenue, often used to normalize distributions for modeling
Maximum single-day return over the last 1 month, used as a proxy for “lottery-like” return profiles
Ratio of long-term debt to total capital, indicating financial leverage
Ratio of long-term debt to common equity, a measure of financial leverage
Ratio of upward to downward FY1 analyst revisions for book value per share over the past 1 month (diffusion measure)
Ratio of upward to downward analyst dividend per share revisions for fiscal year 1 in the past 1 month (“diffusion ratio”)
Diffusion ratio of analyst upward versus downward revisions to the next fiscal year (FY1) EPS estimates over the past 1 month; measures analyst sentiment momentum for FY1 EPS
Ratio of upward to downward FY1 analyst revisions for cash flow per share over the past 1 month (diffusion measure)
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions (diffusion) for next fiscal year Net Asset Value estimates over the past 1 month
Diffusion ratio (upward changes vs. downward changes) in analyst recommendation revisions over the past 1 month; reflects the direction of analyst consensus sentiment
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions in long-term growth estimates over the past month (1M); measures consensus momentum for long-term growth outlook
Diffusion ratio (upward versus downward changes) of analyst target price estimates over the past 1 month
Total stock price return over the past 12 months excluding the most recent month (months -12 to -1)
1-month rolling aggregated analyst revisions to next fiscal year's Book Value Per Share estimates
Aggregate revision in analysts' estimates for next fiscal year's dividend per share over the past 1 month
Net analyst consensus revision in forecasted earnings per share (EPS) for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past 1 month, reflecting recent changes in analyst expectations
Rolling 1-month net analyst estimate revision for next fiscal year's cash flow per share
Net analyst consensus revision in forecasted Net Asset Value (NAV) for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past month
1-month rolling sum or average of analyst recommendation revisions, tracking how analyst opinions (buy/hold/sell) have changed over the last month
1-month rolling aggregated analyst revisions to long-term earnings growth forecasts
Change in consensus next twelve months (NTM) book value per share (BPS) analyst estimates aggregated over the trailing 1 month; reflects revision activity for BPS forecasts
Change in consensus next twelve months (NTM) dividend per share (DPS) analyst estimates over the trailing 1 month; measures revision in forward dividend outlook
Aggregate analyst estimate revision for next twelve months' earnings per share (EPS) over the past 1 month
Rolling 1-month aggregated analyst revision to the Next Twelve Months (forward-looking) Cash Flow Per Share estimate for the stock, as of the snapshot date
The net aggregate revision to next twelve months (NTM) Net Asset Value (NAV) estimates over the past month (1M), measuring recent analyst forecast changes in NTM NAV
Net aggregate analyst revision activity to target price estimates over the past 1 month (rolling), reflecting the average change in consensus target price for the stock
Price to forward 12-month EPS ratio, i.e., next-twelve-month (NTM) projected P/E using consensus estimates

Diffusion (up/down ratio) of analyst estimate revisions for Book Value Per Share (BPS) for the next fiscal year (FY1) over the past 3 months; measures proportion of upward to downward revisions in estimates
Ratio of upward to downward analyst dividend per share revisions for fiscal year 1 in the past 3 months (“diffusion ratio”)
Ratio of upward to downward analyst EPS revisions for fiscal year 1 in the past 3 months (“diffusion ratio”)
Diffusion ratio (ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate changes) for next fiscal year's cash flow per share (CFPS) forecast over the past 3 months
Diffusion ratio: ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions in next fiscal year's (FY1) net asset value estimates over the past 3 months
Ratio of upward to downward changes in analyst recommendations (i.e., upgrades vs downgrades) over the past 3 months
Diffusion ratio (number of up vs. down) of analyst long-term growth estimate changes over the most recent 3 months; shows sentiment balance for long-range growth outlook

Target price diffusion ratio (upward revisions divided by total or downward revisions) over the past 3 months; shows the proportion of analysts revising target prices upward vs downward over this window
3-month rolling aggregated analyst revisions to next fiscal year's Book Value Per Share estimates
Cumulative net analyst revision to FY1 (next fiscal year) dividend per share (DPS) estimate over the past 3 months
Cumulative analyst revisions to next fiscal year's (FY1) earnings per share (EPS) forecast over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst revision to the Fiscal Year 1 (next full fiscal year) Cash Flow Per Share estimate for the stock, as of the snapshot date
Three-month rolling sum or average of analyst estimate revisions to next fiscal year’s Net Asset Value (NAV) for a stock
Net change in analyst recommendation consensus over the past 3 months
Aggregate 3-month rolling net change in consensus analyst estimates of long-term growth (LTG) for the stock
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst revision to the Next Twelve Months (forward-looking) Book Value Per Share estimate for the stock, as of the snapshot date
Net analyst revision in next twelve months (NTM) dividend per share (DPS) estimates over the past 3 months
Rolling 3-month net analyst revision to next-twelve-months EPS estimates
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst revision to the Next Twelve Months (forward-looking) Cash Flow Per Share estimate for the stock, as of the snapshot date
Rolling 3-month aggregated analyst revision to the Next Twelve Months (forward-looking) Net Asset Value estimate for the stock, as of the snapshot date
Rolling 3-month aggregate analyst estimate revision to target price
Moving Average Convergence/Divergence Oscillator, a widely used technical indicator based on the relationship between two moving averages of prices to identify trend direction and momentum
Stability or consistency of the company’s gross margin over the past 5 years, typically measured using a metric such as the R-squared of gross margin time series or a similar stability indicator
Abnormal trading volume, representing current volume scaled or compared to a normal or historical baseline to identify unusually high or low activity
Acceleration of sales over the past 5 years (second derivative of revenue growth)
Balance sheet accruals metric, following the Sloan (1996) definition, capturing the non-cash component of earnings; a proxy for earnings quality or manipulation risk
Altman's Z-score (original 1968 version), a credit risk model that estimates the probability of bankruptcy based on a weighted blend of financial ratios
Merton's distance to default, a structural credit risk measure quantifying how far a firm's assets are from the default threshold
Amihud illiquidity measure, representing the price impact per unit traded volume; higher values imply lower liquidity
Asset growth rate, measuring the annual growth of total assets, as in the Cooper, Gulen, Schill (2008) asset growth anomaly literature
Asset growth anomaly per share; measures the growth rate of total assets on a per share basis, indicating balance sheet expansion normalized by share count
Bollinger Bands: volatility-based technical indicator forming upper and lower bands around a moving average using a multiple of standard deviations
Berry ratio, defined as gross profits divided by operating expenses; a measure of profitability or efficiency
Book-to-market ratio, calculated as book value per share divided by market price per share
Book-to-market ratio using forecasted book value for next fiscal year (FY1)
Ratio of operating cash flow to current liabilities, assessing a company’s ability to cover short-term obligations with cash generated from operations
Operating cash flow yield, operating cash flow divided by market capitalization
Operating cash flow yield (operating cash flow divided by market capitalization or equity value), based on analyst estimate for the coming fiscal year (FY1)
Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) earnings surprise: the standardized deviation of actual reported CFPS from the consensus estimate
Cash flow return on net operating assets; a profitability ratio showing the return produced by operating cash flow relative to net operating assets
Cash flow return on assets; calculated as operating cash flow divided by total assets, reflecting the firm’s ability to generate cash returns from its asset base
Commodity Channel Index, a technical indicator measuring how far a security's price has deviated from its historical average, often used to identify cyclical overbought or oversold conditions
Accumulation Distribution Line, a technical indicator measuring flow of volume in relation to price movement (gauges supply/demand pressure)
Growth rate of current assets over a defined period, likely trailing year; measures recent expansion or contraction of a company’s current assets
Growth rate in per share current assets, quantifying how current assets per share have increased or decreased over time
Average True Range; a technical indicator measuring market volatility by decomposing the entire range of a price for a given period
Acceleration (second derivative) in the company’s dividend per share (DPS) growth rate over the past 5 years, measuring the change in growth trend
Acceleration in historical earnings per share (EPS) growth measured over the last 5 years, indicating change in the rate of EPS growth over that period
Acceleration in Operating Earnings Per Share growth, measured as the change in the growth rate over the past 5 years; captures inflection in historical OEPS growth
Acceleration in Cash Flow Per Share growth, measuring change in CFPS growth rate over the past 5 years—i.e., the second derivative of 5Y historical CFPS growth
Merton's distance to default, a structural model-based measure estimating the likelihood a company will default based on asset value volatility and capital structure
Market capitalization of the company in exchange/local trading currency
Earnings yield (inverse of P/E) based on analyst consensus forecast EPS for the next twelve months (NTM), using the median estimate
The standardized surprise (deviation) between reported net asset value (NAV) and analyst consensus NAV estimate, indicating whether NAV beat or missed consensus expectations
Net income margin; net income as a percentage of total revenue
Abnormal (z-scored versus 1-year baseline) aggregate sentiment of novel, relevant, and non-neutral news items for the prior day
Abnormal (z-scored versus 1-year history) number of novel, relevant, and non-neutral news stories in 1 day, compared to baseline 365-day average
Average news sentiment score, aggregating positive/negative sentiment from relevant news articles over the past 1 month
Average news sentiment score over the trailing 3 months, quantifying the prevailing tone of news coverage for the stock during this period
Number of novel, relevant, and non-neutral news articles/events about the company in the past 1 day
Number of novel, relevant, and non-neutral news articles over the trailing 91 days
Target price implied return, calculated as the percentage return from current price to consensus analyst target price
Chaikin Oscillator—technical indicator measuring accumulation/distribution momentum based on volume and price
Historical stability (measured as coefficient of determination, e.g., R²) of operating earnings per share (EPS) over time
Normalized EPS (Earnings Per Share) surprise, calculated as the standardized residual between reported and consensus expected EPS
Current price divided by the lowest price over the trailing 52 weeks, indicating proximity to the 1-year low
DecisionPoint Price Momentum Oscillator: a price momentum oscillator that signals trend direction and potential reversals based on smoothed price changes
Number of analysts providing next fiscal year (FY1) earnings per share (EPS) estimates for the company
Number of analysts providing recommendations for the security
Operating profit margin, also known as EBIT margin
Year-over-year (YoY) change in operating profit margin
Detrended Price Oscillator, a technical indicator showing price cycles by removing the trend from price data
Percentage price oscillator—a technical analysis indicator showing the difference between two moving averages of a security’s price as a percentage, used to gauge momentum or trend
Product of trailing twelve months earnings yield and expected five-year earnings growth rate, capturing a value-growth combined factor
Stochastic Oscillator, a momentum indicator comparing a particular closing price to a range of prices over a set period to signal potential overbought or oversold conditions
Percentage Volume Oscillator, a technical indicator that measures the percentage difference between two moving averages of volume, used to gauge changes in trading volume trends
12-month price trend indicator measuring the overall direction or slope of a stock’s price movement over the past year
Accounts payable turnover ratio, calculated as cost of goods sold or purchases divided by average accounts payable, indicating how quickly payables are paid
Tangible book-to-market ratio, calculated as tangible book value (book value excluding intangible assets) per share divided by market price per share
Percent accruals, a measure of the proportion of earnings attributable to non-cash (accrual-based) items
Number of employees at the reporting company
Price-to-sales ratio, calculated as current market price divided by sales per share or revenue per share
Price-to-sales ratio using analyst estimate for sales in the next fiscal year (FY1); calculated as current price divided by forecasted FY1 sales per share
Quick ratio (acid-test ratio), calculated as (current assets minus inventories) divided by current liabilities, measuring immediate liquidity
Realized volatility of the stock calculated using daily returns over the past 1 year
Realized volatility, typically measured as the standard deviation of daily returns, computed over the past 3 months (about 63 trading days)
Accounts receivable turnover ratio, calculated as net sales divided by average accounts receivable, indicating how quickly receivables are collected
Year-over-year growth rate in current assets (assets expected to be realized within one year)
Growth rate of other assets, calculated as the percentage change in assets not classified as current or PPE, over a relevant period (usually year-over-year)
Growth rate of property, plant, and equipment, typically year-over-year
Year-over-year growth rate in total shareholders' equity (owners' equity in the business)
Year-over-year growth rate in current liabilities (liabilities due within one year)
Year-over-year growth rate of total liabilities
Year-over-year growth rate in current assets per share
Year-over-year growth rate in other assets per share
Year-over-year growth rate in property, plant, and equipment per share
Growth rate of total equity per share, measuring how the total shareholders' equity per share has changed (likely year-over-year growth)
Year-over-year growth rate in current liabilities per share
Year-over-year growth rate in total liabilities per share
Return on net operating assets, calculated on a trailing twelve month basis; measures profitability relative to operating assets deployed
Stability (consistency) of Return on Assets (ROA) over the past 5 years, likely measured as the time series R-squared or similar stability metric
Return on equity over the last twelve months
Year-over-year change in return on equity
Stability (e.g., standard deviation, R-squared, or other consistency metric) of return on equity (ROE) over a 5-year period
Return on invested capital for the last twelve months
Average True Range: measures market volatility by decomposing the entire range of an asset price for a given period
Williams %R, a momentum oscillator measuring a stock’s closing price relative to its high-low range over a specified period (typically 14 days), indicating overbought or oversold conditions
Sales divided by total assets, representing asset turnover
Year-over-year change in asset turnover ratio, measuring change in sales relative to asset base
Asset turnover ratio forecast for fiscal year 1 (FY1); calculated as sales divided by total assets for the next fiscal year
Revenue per employee, calculated as total sales or revenue divided by the number of employees, used as a measure of labor efficiency and productivity
Total revenue divided by total enterprise value (TEV), representing a valuation ratio (Revenue/TEV)
Historical stability (consistency) of company revenue over time, measured as the coefficient of determination (R-squared) of revenue time series, indicating how stable sales have been across periods
Revenue surprise: the standardized or relative difference between actual revenue reported and consensus analyst estimates for the same period
Coefficient of variation (standard deviation divided by mean) of FY1 (next fiscal year) analyst revenue (sales) estimates, reflecting the dispersion in sales forecasts
Year-over-year change in the number of shares outstanding for the company
Skewness of daily returns over the past year; captures the asymmetry of return distribution for the stock, which indicates downside or upside risk bias
Forecasted growth rate of dividends per share (DPS) for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Growth rate of Dividend Per Share (DPS) forecast for the second future fiscal year (FY2), typically reflecting expected DPS increase from FY1 to FY2 based on analyst estimates or consensus
Year-over-year growth rate of interim Dividends Per Share based on historical actuals
Acceleration of dividend per share (DPS) growth over the past 5 years, i.e., how the DPS growth rate has changed over that time
Historical 5-year compound annual growth rate or trend of company dividends per share (DPS)
Forecasted growth rate of EPS for next fiscal year (FY1), likely relative to prior year
Expected growth rate of Earnings Per Share for the second fiscal year ahead compared to the year before
Year-over-year growth rate of interim (e.g., quarterly or semiannual) Earnings Per Share based on historical actuals
Year-over-year growth in expected interim Earnings Per Share, likely using consensus analyst forecasts
Acceleration in earnings per share (EPS) growth rate over the previous five years, indicating whether EPS growth is speeding up or slowing down historically
Consensus analyst estimate for expected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of earnings per share (EPS) over the next 5 years, forward-looking
Historical 5-year compound annual growth rate or trend of company earnings per share (EPS)
Acceleration of operating earnings per share (OEPS) growth over the past 5 years, i.e., how rapidly the operating EPS growth rate has itself changed in this period
Historical 5-year compound annual growth rate or trend of company operating earnings per share (OEPS)
Growth rate of Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) forecast for the next fiscal year (FY1) compared to the current/last year, commonly based on analyst projections
Growth rate of Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS) forecast for the second next fiscal year (FY2) versus FY1, reflecting analyst or consensus expected CFPS increase
Year-over-year growth rate of interim Cash Flow Per Share based on historical actuals

Year-over-year growth of expected interim Cash Flow Per Share (CFPS), likely measuring the projected CFPS increase in an interim period (such as semi-annual versus prior year semi-annual), based on consensus or models
Acceleration of cash flow per share (CFPS) growth over the past 5 years, reflecting change in growth rate of per-share cash flow
Historical 5-year compound annual growth rate or trend of company cash flow per share (CFPS)
Year-over-year growth rate of interim Sales Per Share (i.e., revenue per share) based on historical actuals
Volume Price Trend: a cumulative indicator that integrates price direction and volume, intended to show the strength of price movements based on trading volume
On Balance Volume—a technical indicator that accumulates volume based on the direction of price movements, used to gauge momentum or confirm trends
Ratio of levered free cash flow to total enterprise value; a cash-based valuation metric
Close Location Value, a technical measure indicating where the closing price falls within the day’s range (high-low), used to gauge buying or selling pressure
Ease of Movement: a volume-based oscillator designed to measure the "ease" with which an asset price moves based on its volume and price change
Volatility of the ratio of trading volume to price over a 12-month period
Volatility of the ratio of trading volume to price over a 1-month period
Average (mean) analyst recommendation for the stock, referring to consensus rating (e.g., buy/hold/sell average)
DecisionPoint Price Momentum Oscillator—technical indicator measuring price momentum oscillations
Money Flow Index, a technical indicator using price and volume to measure buying and selling pressure
Moving Average Convergence/Divergence Oscillator; a technical indicator measuring the relationship between two moving averages of price

A moving average crossover technical factor comparing the 15-week and 36-week moving averages of price, often used to identify changes in price trends; positive when short-term (15W) MA crosses above long-term (36W) MA
Moving average crossover comparing 30-week vs 75-week moving averages to identify momentum/trend changes
Natural logarithm of total assets (a standard transformation for scale normalization)
1-month rolling net analyst consensus revision in next fiscal year (FY1) Net Asset Value estimate
Negative Volume Index, a technical indicator tracking price changes occurring on days with lower volume than the previous day, often used to reveal smart money movements
The magnitude of surprise in reported Net Asset Value (NAV) versus the consensus analyst estimate (usually standardized)
Net income margin; a profitability metric defined as Net Income divided by Revenue, representing profit as a percent of sales
Average news sentiment score over the past month, summarizing positive/negative tone of news coverage about the company in a one-month window
Average news sentiment score calculated over the past 3 months
Number of new, relevant, non-neutral news articles related to the company in the last day
The count of novel, relevant, or non-neutral news items about the stock over the past 91 days (approximately 3 months)
Rolling 1-month change in next-twelve-months (NTM) analyst estimates for cash flow per share (CFPS); i.e., net revision activity in forward CFPS over the last month
Aggregate revision in analyst estimates of next twelve months’ (NTM) cash flow per share (CFPS) over the rolling past 3 months period; measures changes in analyst sentiment regarding future CFPS
Net change in mean analyst estimates for next-twelve-months dividends per share (NTM DPS) over the past 3 months, reflecting the magnitude/direction of recent analyst dividend revisions
Analyst revision to the estimate of EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes) for the next twelve months, aggregated over the trailing 3-month rolling window
Rolling 1-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions to Earnings Per Share (EPS) forecasts for the next twelve months
Net change in analyst consensus ROE (Return on Equity) forecast for the next twelve months over the past 1 month
On Balance Volume: technical indicator that uses cumulative volume flow to indicate momentum, calculated by adding or subtracting daily volume depending on price movement direction
Cash flow return on equity; ratio of operating cash flow to equity, indicating profitability with respect to shareholder equity, based on cash flows rather than net income
Stability (coefficient of determination, likely R²) of historical operating EPS, measuring how stable operating earnings per share have been over time
Normalized surprise in operating EPS—amount by which reported operating EPS exceeded or missed consensus estimates, normalized (e.g., as a z-score)
Year-over-year (YoY) change in operating profit margin
Operating profit margin, specifically EBIT margin (Operating Income/Revenue), indicating profitability from core operations
Growth rate in other assets; percentage growth in the balance sheet line “other assets”
Growth in per share other assets
Percentage Price Oscillator, a technical momentum indicator calculated using the difference between two moving averages as a percentage of a longer moving average
Percentage Volume Oscillator, a technical indicator measuring percent difference between two moving averages of volume
Growth rate in property, plant, and equipment (likely measures the year-over-year or period-over-period change in the company's tangible fixed assets)
Growth rate in per-share value of property, plant, and equipment (PPE); reflects capital asset expansion or contraction relative to share count
High Low Mid Point
Total price return from 12 months ago up to 1 month ago (i.e., excluding the most recent month), used as a price momentum measure
Current price divided by the highest price in the past 52 weeks
Ratio of current price to 52-week low price, indicating how far the stock price is above its one-year low
Price-to-earnings ratio using trailing twelve month (LTM) basic EPS
Price-to-earnings ratio using last twelve months (LTM) earnings per share on a diluted basis
Forward price-to-earnings ratio using analyst-estimated earnings for the next 12 months (FY1); current share price divided by forecast EPS for the upcoming fiscal year
Forward-looking price-to-earnings ratio using analyst EPS forecasts for fiscal year 2 (the year after next), calculated as current market price divided by FY2 forecasted EPS
Price-to-sales ratio; current price divided by trailing or forecasted sales per share
Stability of gross profit margin over a 5-year period, likely measured as temporal consistency or variance (e.g., R-squared or standard deviation)
Expected growth rate of cash flow per share (CFPS) for the company’s fiscal year two years ahead (FY2), typically based on analyst forecasts
Growth rate of cash flow per share (CFPS) expected for the next fiscal year (Fiscal Year 1)
Expected year-over-year percentage growth in dividends per share for next fiscal year
Growth rate of forecasted earnings per share (EPS) for the next fiscal year (FY1), measuring how much analysts expect EPS to increase or decrease in the coming year compared to the prior year
Forecasted reinvestment rate for the next fiscal year
Forecasted sales (revenue) growth for the next fiscal year (FY1), normally as a percentage change from the current year
Quick ratio (acid test), a liquidity ratio measured as (current assets minus inventories) divided by current liabilities
Realized volatility of the stock calculated daily over the past 1 year (typically using daily returns), representing actual observed price variability
Realized volatility calculated using daily returns over the past 3 months
Net change in analyst recommendation scores over the past 3 months
Kurtosis of daily returns over the past 1 year, measuring the "tailedness" or extremity of return distribution
Skewness of daily returns computed over the past year (1Y), measuring asymmetry of return distribution
Return on Assets (ROA) calculated over the last twelve months (LTM)
Return on Equity (ROE) for the last twelve months (LTM), a profitability metric
Return on Invested Capital, using data from the last twelve months (LTM), measures profitability relative to total capital invested by debt and equity holders
Return on net operating assets (net operating profit after tax divided by average net operating assets) using data from the last twelve months
Ratio of upward to downward analyst estimate revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) sales over the past 3 months
Revenue per employee, measuring sales efficiency or labor productivity
Revenue surprise—the difference between actual reported sales and consensus analyst estimate, likely z-scored
Ratio of Revenue to Total Enterprise Value (TEV); a valuation metric
Coefficient of variation (relative variability) of FY1 revenue estimates, measuring the dispersion or uncertainty in analysts’ FY1 sales forecasts
Ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for forecasted next-fiscal-year Return on Equity (ROE) over the past 1 month (measures diffusion of positive vs negative revisions)
3-month diffusion ratio of upward to downward analyst revisions for next fiscal year (FY1) return on equity (ROE)
Rolling 1-month aggregated analyst estimate revisions to Return on Equity forecasts for the next fiscal year (FY1)
Mean or consensus analyst forecast for Return on Equity for FY1 (next fiscal year) as of the point-in-time date
Year-over-year (YoY) change in shares outstanding
Stochastic Oscillator: technical momentum indicator comparing the closing price to a range of prices over a period (often 14 days) to identify potential overbought or oversold conditions
Tangible book-to-market ratio, the ratio of tangible book value to market capitalization (value factor)
Implied return to current price based on analysts’ average target price; calculated as (mean target price / current price) - 1
Net revision in analyst 12-month target price consensus over the past 1 month

Growth in total shareholders’ equity, typically measured as the percent change in equity year-over-year (YoY) or over a defined period, indicating how the company’s net worth to shareholders is expanding or contracting
Growth rate in total shareholders’ equity per share, likely over the most recent period or year
Growth rate of per share total liabilities, measuring the change in total liabilities per share over time
Growth rate of total liabilities, indicating how quickly a company’s total debt and obligations have increased over a recent period
Total return over the past 1260 trading days (approximately 5 years or 60 months)
Cumulative (total) price return (momentum) over the last 126 trading days (approximately 6 months)
Price momentum over the past 9 months (approximately 189 trading days), typically calculated as cumulative return over this interval
Total return of the stock over the past 21 trading days (approximately 1 month)
Total holding period return over the past 2520 trading days (approximately 10 years)
Total price return or momentum over the last 252 trading days, which is approximately 12 months
Total return (including dividends, if applicable) over the past 63 trading days, roughly 3 months
Total shareholder yield, calculated as dividend yield plus net share repurchase (buyback) yield
Trailing dividend yield, calculated as dividends paid over the last year divided by share price
Triple Exponential Average (TRIX) indicator, a momentum oscillator measuring the rate of change of a triple-smoothed exponential moving average; used to highlight inflection points in price trends

Triple Exponential Average (TRIX) - a momentum indicator showing the percent rate of change of a triple exponentially smoothed moving average, commonly used to identify overbought or oversold conditions in technical analysis
True Strength Index, a technical momentum indicator measuring price trend strength and direction
Price trend over the past 12 months, likely capturing the slope or consistency of price movement
Rolling 1-month window of changes in analyst estimates for earnings or related volatility (most likely refers to change in dispersion/variation of analyst estimates over 1M)
Analyst estimate volatility metric measuring how much analyst earnings forecasts have changed (variability) over the past 3 months
One-month rolling volatility (standard deviation) of the ratio of trading volume to price
Volume Price Trend; a technical indicator combining price direction and volume to assess the strength of price trends
Volatility of volume/price, 12M
Vortex Indicator, a technical indicator that identifies the start of a new trend or confirms trend direction based on price movements

Williams %R, a technical analysis momentum indicator showing the current closing price in relation to the high-low range over a specified period, typically used to indicate overbought or oversold conditions
Year-over-year change in total debt outstanding for the company
Year-over-year change in Return on Assets (ROA) for the company
Total shareholder yield, defined as the sum of dividend yield plus buyback yield minus issuance yield (i.e., total yield distributed to shareholders via dividends and net buybacks)
Year-over-year (YoY) change in return on equity, reflecting the improvement or deterioration in ROE compared to the same period last year
